rationale.fidelity: Preserves start-of-window zone slot limits, uncertain orders/service times, regular capacity, overtime, and expected same-day margin net of overtime.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly presents the operator, timing, load mechanism, capacity exposure, margin-overtime tension, and alternative tighter or looser limits.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No literature-relative claim is requested or made.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly excludes loyalty and retention claims because neither the objective nor supplied evidence supports them.
rationale.prose_clarity: Compact and accessible with no needless jargon.
rationale.overall: Complete and credible capacity framing with strong claim boundaries and no hard failure.
